MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: COURT-APPOINTED RECEIVER MICHAEL BREWER'S Motion And For Order

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: COURT-APPOINTED RECEIVER MICHAEL BREWER'S Motion for Order is granted. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

Order submitted with moving papers signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EPS)

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF CREDITOR'S TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Michael Brewer As Receiver is GRANTED. Moving party to prepare form of order. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/jpt

Off Calendar Jul-25-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CREDITOR'S TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. Judgment debtors In the Mist, Inc. and Andrew N. Picklesimer, and Misti Lee Mayer waived all objections to the discovery propounded by failing to respond to it. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340.00. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin; Not reported =302/jpt
